old_value: {"id":"workspace-1no.1","title":"ADR-001: Application Framework","description":"Write ADR-001 documenting the choice of cosalette as the application framework. Compare against alternatives (raw paho-mqtt, custom asyncio, Home Assistant add-on). Document decision drivers: MQTT lifecycle, structured logging, health reporting, testing support, device archetypes.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:13Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:13Z"}

{"id":"workspace-1no.2","title":"ADR-002: Sensor ID Management Strategy","description":"Write ADR-002 documenting the hybrid sensor ID management approach: named sensors with auto-adopt for battery replacements plus a raw diagnostic channel. Cover the auto-adopt algorithm (oldest-stale heuristic), manual override via MQTT commands, persistence requirements, and disambiguation mode for multi-sensor failures.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:20Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:20Z"}

{"id":"workspace-1no.3","title":"ADR-003: Hardware Abstraction","description":"Write ADR-003 documenting the hexagonal port/adapter approach for JeeLink hardware. Wrap pylacrosse behind a JeeLinkPort protocol for testability and dry-run mode. Document lazy import strategy, fake adapter design, and the push-based (event-driven) nature of the receiver.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:27Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:27Z"}

{"id":"workspace-1no.4","title":"ADR-004: Sensor Registry \u0026 Persistence","description":"Write ADR-004 documenting the SensorRegistry design and its persistence strategy. Cover the ID-to-name mapping lifecycle, cosalette JsonFileStore backend, SaveOnChange policy, staleness tracking, per-sensor calibration offsets, and state recovery on restart.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:33Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:33Z"}

{"id":"workspace-4xx.1","title":"Domain models","description":"Create domain model classes: SensorReading (id, temperature, humidity, low_battery), SensorConfig (name, temp_offset, humidity_offset, staleness_timeout), MappingEvent (for logging mapping changes). Use frozen dataclasses or similar immutable structures.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:40Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:40Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wog.1","title":"Settings class","description":"Create Jeelink2MqttSettings subclass of cosalette.Settings. Fields: serial_port (/dev/ttyUSB0), baud_rate (57600), sensors (list of SensorConfig with name, temp_offset, humidity_offset), staleness_timeout_seconds (600), median_filter_window (7), heartbeat_interval_seconds (180). Remove old config.py. Use JEELINK2MQTT_ env prefix with __ nested delimiter.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:17Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:17Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wog.2","title":"JeeLinkPort protocol","description":"Define JeeLinkPort as a PEP 544 Protocol with @runtime_checkable. Methods: open(), close(), start_scan(), register_callback(fn), led_mode_state(bool). This wraps the pylacrosse interface cleanly.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:23Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:23Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wog.5","title":"Error types","description":"Define domain exceptions: SerialConnectionError, FrameParseError, MappingConflictError, StalenessTimeoutError. Create error_type_map dict for cosalette error handling.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:42Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:42Z"}

{"id":"workspace-4xx.2","title":"Sensor registry","description":"Implement SensorRegistry class managing ID-to-name mappings. Features: add/remove/query mappings, auto-adopt algorithm (assign unknown ID to oldest-stale sensor), staleness detection (configurable timeout, default 10 min), last-seen tracking per sensor, disambiguation query (list unknown IDs with recent values), manual assign/reset via method calls. Must be serializable for persistence.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:47Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:47Z"}

{"id":"workspace-4xx.3","title":"Per-sensor filtering","description":"Create a FilterBank class managing one MedianFilter (window=7) per sensor ID. Automatically creates filters for new IDs. Uses cosalette.filters.MedianFilter. Returns filtered temperature and humidity values.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:54Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:56:54Z"}

{"id":"workspace-4xx.4","title":"Calibration","description":"Implement calibration offset application: per-sensor configurable temperature and humidity offsets loaded from settings. Applied after filtering, before publishing.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:00Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:00Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wog.3","title":"PyLaCrosseAdapter","description":"Implement the real adapter wrapping pylacrosse. Use lazy import string registration. Translates pylacrosse callbacks into SensorReading domain objects. Handles SerialException.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:29Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:29Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wog.4","title":"FakeJeeLinkAdapter","description":"Implement fake adapter for dry-run mode and testing. Produces configurable SensorReading sequences. Supports scenario simulation (ID changes, battery low flags, timing).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:35Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:35Z"}

{"id":"workspace-4xx.5","title":"Unit tests for domain layer","description":"Comprehensive unit tests for: registry auto-adopt (single stale, multiple stale, no stale, all stale), staleness detection, mapping CRUD, filter bank (new ID, existing ID, median correctness), calibration offset application. Follow pytest patterns from testing instructions. Use ISTQB test techniques (state transition for registry, BVA for staleness threshold, decision table for auto-adopt).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:08Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:08Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wog.6","title":"Unit tests for infrastructure","description":"Tests for Settings validation, FakeJeeLinkAdapter behavior, error type mapping. Integration-light tests for adapter frame parsing.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:48Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:48Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wh1.1","title":"App construction","description":"Create app.py with cosalette.App construction: settings_class, lifespan (serial open/close), adapter registration (JeeLinkPort with lazy import + FakeJeeLinkAdapter for dry-run). Wire SensorRegistry as shared state via adapter pattern.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:55Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:57:55Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wh1.2","title":"Receiver device","description":"Implement @app.device('receiver') — the main serial read loop. Reads frames from JeeLinkPort, resolves IDs via SensorRegistry, applies MedianFilter + calibration, publishes to per-sensor topics (jeelink2mqtt/{name}/state). Manages per-sensor availability (online/offline based on staleness). Publishes heartbeat every configurable interval even when values unchanged.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:03Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:03Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wh1.3","title":"Mapping command handler","description":"Implement @app.command('mapping') for MQTT-based mapping management. Commands: assign (force ID→name), reset (clear one mapping), reset-all, list-unknown (show unmapped IDs with recent readings for disambiguation). Publishes mapping state to jeelink2mqtt/mapping/state after each change.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:10Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:10Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wh1.4","title":"Raw diagnostic channel","description":"Publish all incoming frames to jeelink2mqtt/raw/state (non-retained, QoS 0) for debugging. Include raw sensor ID, temperature, humidity, low_battery, timestamp. This runs alongside the named-sensor publishing.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:17Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:17Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wh1.5","title":"Persistence wiring","description":"Configure JsonFileStore for SensorRegistry state. Wire SaveOnChange policy. Verify state survives restart: mapping table, last-seen timestamps. Pre-seed store for fresh installs with empty mapping.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:24Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:24Z"}

{"id":"workspace-wh1.6","title":"Integration tests","description":"Full lifecycle integration tests using AppHarness + FakeJeeLinkAdapter. Test: startup→receive→publish cycle, auto-adopt on new ID, mapping command flow, persistence across simulated restart, availability transitions, raw diagnostic output.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:31Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:31Z"}

{"id":"workspace-v3g.1","title":"Landing page \u0026 nav structure","description":"Create docs/index.md with project overview, features, and quick-start link. Set up zensical.toml navigation with full user-journey structure: Getting Started, Setup, Use, Operate, Troubleshoot, Reference, ADRs.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:38Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:38Z"}

{"id":"workspace-v3g.2","title":"Getting Started guide","description":"Write install guide: uv add, configure .env, first run, dry-run mode demo. Quick verification that MQTT messages are flowing.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:44Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:44Z"}

{"id":"workspace-v3g.3","title":"Setup guide","description":"Hardware setup: JeeLink USB receiver, LaCrosse sensors, pairing. MQTT broker setup (Mosquitto). OpenHAB integration: MQTT things/items/channels for named sensor topics.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:51Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:51Z"}

{"id":"workspace-v3g.4","title":"User guide","description":"Sensor management: how auto-adopt works, manual mapping via MQTT, disambiguation workflow for multi-battery failures, calibration offsets, understanding the raw diagnostic channel.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:57Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:58:57Z"}

{"id":"workspace-v3g.5","title":"Operations guide","description":"Docker deployment (Dockerfile + compose), systemd service, monitoring via MQTT topics (status, availability, error), structured log analysis, health checks.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:59:04Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:59:04Z"}

{"id":"workspace-v3g.6","title":"Troubleshooting guide","description":"Common issues: serial port permissions, sensor not appearing, mapping conflicts, stale sensor detection, MQTT connectivity. Diagnostic steps using raw channel and structured logs.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:59:10Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:59:10Z"}

{"id":"workspace-v3g.7","title":"Reference section","description":"Complete reference: all settings with env var names, MQTT topic map with payload schemas, CLI options, error types.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:59:17Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:59:17Z"}

{"id":"workspace-v3g.8","title":"GitHub Pages CI","description":"Create .github/workflows/docs.yml for building and deploying Zensical docs to GitHub Pages on push to main.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:59:22Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:59:22Z"}

{"id":"workspace-7qb","title":"Increase test coverage to 80%","description":"Coverage is at 63% — main gaps are receiver.py (0%, needs AppHarness), PyLaCrosseAdapter (needs pylacrosse mock), commands.py handler (needs AppHarness), app.py (lifespan/factory). Target 80% by adding AppHarness-based integration tests for the receiver loop and command handler.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T20:54:29Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T20:54:29Z"}
